name: lawyer_consultation_05

input.subject: Confirmed: Initial Consultation with Attorney Williams
input.body_text:
Dear Mr. Johnson,

This confirms your initial consultation with Attorney Robert Williams.

Appointment Details:
--------------------
Date: Wednesday, February 11, 2026
Time: 11:00 AM - 12:00 PM
Type: Estate Planning Consultation

Location:
Williams Law Group
100 California Street, 20th Floor
San Francisco, CA 94111

Parking: Validated parking available in building garage

Please bring the following documents:
- Valid ID
- Current will (if applicable)
- List of assets and beneficiaries

The initial consultation fee is $250, payable at the time of appointment.

If you have any questions, please contact our office at (415) 555-4567.

We look forward to meeting with you.

Sincerely,
Williams Law Group
Scheduling Department
